task_completion.description: Open the Sygic GPS Navigation application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface (map view or main menu) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the map management or offline maps section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu or screen titled 'Manage Maps', 'Maps', 'Offline Maps', or similar is visible within the Sygic app.

task_completion.description: Locate the Monaco map in the available downloads list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The region 'Monaco' is visible in the list of countries or regions available for download (likely under a 'Europe' category).

task_completion.description: Initiate the download for the Monaco map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A download progress bar, a downloading icon, or a visual state change indicating the Monaco map download has started.

task_completion.description: Verify the Monaco map is successfully added to the downloaded maps list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Monaco' is explicitly listed under the 'Downloaded', 'Installed', or 'My Maps' section of the app, indicating the download is complete and the map is ready for offline use.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the Sygic Android app, not a web browser, text editor, or generic file manager.

integrity.description: Verify the map was downloaded via the app's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the app's menus and buttons, rather than terminal commands or scripts being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the download actually occurred during the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the map being selected from the available/undownloaded list before appearing in the downloaded list, ruling out simply viewing a pre-existing installation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target region is 'Monaco'. In Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura), offline maps are managed within the app's GUI. The VLM should look for 'Monaco' in the 'Downloaded' or 'Installed' maps list to confirm success. If the agent additionally verifies via the file system, Sygic stores maps in '/sdcard/Android/data/com.sygic.aura/files/Maps' and the folder/file name will likely contain the ISO code 'mco' or 'monaco'.
